{{Infobox artifact
| name = Forged spear
| introduced = cradle-02-soulsmith
}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|A [[Forged spear]] was used to kill a bear-sized beast.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c5">''Soulsmith'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|A [[Forged spear]] can be used in combat.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c18">''Soulsmith'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Akura Grace]] was pinned by a [[Forged spear]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] struck with a [[Forged spear]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c16">''Reaper'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
